title: 1.15 Dragon Hitbox Fix
description: Fixes the dragon hitboxes being rendered wrong in 1.15.x
body:
Fixes the dragon hitboxes being rendered wrong in 1.15.x.

In these versions the position of the dragons hitbox was calculated wrong, causing it to render 2x as far from 0 0 0 as the dragons actual position. This mod fixes that with a simple mixin.

The mod works for versions 19w41a - 20w14infinite. This includes all 1.15.x releases.
